word: H798 - אַשְׁדֹּות הַפִּסְגָּה - ʼAshdôwth hap-Piçgâh - ash-doth' hap-pisgaw' - Ashdoth-pisgah

sections.paragraph:
אשׁדּות הפּסגּה - 'ashdôth happisgâh - ash-doth' hap-pis-gaw'

From the plural of H794 and H6449 with the article interposed; ravines of the Pisgah; Ashdoth-Pisgah, a place east of the Jordan: - Ashdoth-pisgah.
